completed_tasks.title: Add Coverage Script Configuration
completed_tasks.description: Ensure coverage script is properly defined and working. The npm run test:coverage exists but needs verification.
success_criteria: Coverage script executes without errors
Coverage reports are generated correctly
Coverage thresholds are enforced

completed_tasks.title: Verify ESLint Detection by Quality System
completed_tasks.description: The quality system reports "No ESLint configuration found" but we have working ESLint configs. Investigate why detection is failing.
success_criteria: Quality system correctly detects ESLint configuration
Strike 2 quality score improves from 70% to 100%
Linting works across all packages without detection issues

completed_tasks.title: Create Quality Improvement Tasks
completed_tasks.description: Analyze project quality issues and create specific tasks to reach 100% quality for all strikes
completed_tasks.prompt:
Project quality assessment shows issues preventing 100% strike success:

Quality Status:
- Strike 1 (Build): 100%
- Strike 2 (Lint): 70%  
- Strike 3 (Tests): 30%

Issues Found:
- Lint and Code Quality: No ESLint configuration found
- Test Coverage and Success: Tests are failing
- Test Coverage and Success: No coverage script defined

TASK: Analyze these quality gaps and create specific improvement tasks to bring ALL strikes to 100% quality. Create tasks for:
1. Build issues (missing dependencies, build failures, configuration)
2. Code quality issues (lint errors, style violations, code standards)
3. Testing issues (failing tests, missing coverage, test setup)

Insert all improvement tasks BEFORE the strike review tasks. Strikes should always remain last in the task list.
success_criteria: All quality issues identified and analyzed
Specific improvement tasks created for each quality gap
Tasks properly prioritized and ordered before strikes
Clear path to 100% quality established

completed_tasks.title: Fix DI Circular Dependency Issues in Core Package Tests
completed_tasks.description: Resolve circular dependency between Logger and InstanceSettings that is preventing multiple test suites from running. This affects ExecuteSingleContext, WebhookContext, TriggerContext, ExecuteContext, LoadOptionsContext, SupplyDataContext, HookContext, and PollContext tests.
success_criteria: All node execution context tests can initialize without DI circular dependency errors
Logger and InstanceSettings dependency cycle resolved
Test suites run without instantiation failures

completed_tasks.title: Fix AWS SDK Type Issues in Object Store Service
completed_tasks.description: Resolve TypeScript compilation errors in object-store.service.ee.ts where AWS SDK _Object type does not have expected properties like key, causing test compilation failures.
success_criteria: AWS SDK types properly imported and used
Object store tests compile without TypeScript errors
Property access on _Object type resolved

completed_tasks.title: Fix Core Package Logic Errors in Tests
completed_tasks.description: Fix specific test logic failures including run-data-utils negative index handling, request helper function error handling, and file system helper function tests.
success_criteria: getNextExecutionIndex handles negative values correctly
Request helper function error handling tests pass
File system helper function tests pass
All core logic test assertions align with implementation

completed_tasks.title: Fix Get Input Connection Data Test Suite
completed_tasks.description: Resolve the massive test failure in get-input-connection-data.test.ts affecting all AI-related connection types (ai_agent, ai_chain, ai_document, etc.). This involves 96 failing tests.
success_criteria: All AI connection type tests pass
Input validation logic works correctly
Connection handling for various AI node types resolved
96 failing tests reduced to 0

completed_tasks.title: Fix Type Compatibility Issues in Workflow Execute Tests
completed_tasks.description: Resolve TypeScript type incompatibilities in workflow-execute.test.ts and directory-loader.test.ts related to INodeParameters, IExecuteData, and node type descriptions.
success_criteria: Type assignments between INodeParameters and expected types resolved
Node type description compatibility fixed
Workflow execute tests compile without type errors
Directory loader tests compile without type errors
